name: Animal Speech
description: You are able to communicate using the secret language of animals. The text will tell you when you can cast this spell.

name: Armour of Heaven
description: Gain a +3 bonus to one party member's Armour which lasts until the end of this battle.

name: Ice Bolt
description: You conjure a great block of ice and hurl it at your foe with magical strength. Make an immediate attack with a Fighting score of 8 against any opponent.

name: Poison Stream
description: A sickly green poison jets from your hands. Make two immediate attacks with a Fighting score of 5, against two different opponents.

name: Unfailing Strike
description: A pillar of energy sizzles into a single foe. Choose an opponent to lose 3 Health.

name: Wolf Spirit
description: You summon the spirit of the wolf to help guide you from danger in the natural world. Cast this spell when you fail a Survival check. You gain an additional 3 automatic successes for this check only.

name: Magic Cabinet
description: You summon a magic cabinet made of purple wood. You can use this cabinet to access The Vault, storing and/or taking out as many items as you wish. When you have done this, the cabinet will vanish, until summoned again.

name: Wisdom
description: Your mind awakens with ancient knowledge. Cast this spell when you have failed a Lore check. You gain 3 automatic successes for this check only.

name: Dazing Lights
description: Swirling lights dazzle your foes' eyes. When your opponents attack this round they must reduce the score of each of their dice by 1 point.

name: Soothing Touch
description: Your hands glow with divine energy. Choose one of your party members; they can restore 5 Health points.

name: Shadow Door
description: You can detect the secret doors installed by the penumbral lords when they ruled the land. The text will tell you when you can cast this spell.

name: Teleport Circle
description: You invoke your spell and concentrate hard on your destination. You can feel the portal links that connect to a known location. Teleports the caster to a previously visited location.

name: Silver Tongue
description: Your confidence grows as you summon this spell. Cast this spell when you fail a Charisma check. You gain an additional 3 automatic successes for this check only.

name: Sandstorm
description: You whip up a blast of glassy sand to shred all your foes at once. Make an immediate attack with a Fighting score of 3 against each opponent.

name: Clinging Dread
description: Doubt and uncertainty fill the hearts of the enemy soldiers. Reduce the Morale score of an enemy unit by 1 point. Can only be cast during Mass Combat — has no effect on personal combat.

name: Warp Wood
description: You utter a spell to twist and split the hull of an enemy ship. Choose an enemy ship to lose 3 Health. Can only be cast during sea combat.

name: Scroll of Rage
description: Use in combat to increase the Fighting score of each of your party members by 1 point until the end of the combat. Single use — consumed after one use.
